name: mfe-playground
description: Micro Frontends monorepo with Native Federation

scripts.dev: concurrently -n host,remote-ng,remote-react,remote-vue -c blue,green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w packages/host" "npm run dev -w packages/remote-angular" "npm run dev -w packages/remote-react" "npm run dev -w packages/remote-vue"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently "npm run build -w packages/remote-angular" "npm run build -w packages/remote-react" "npm run build -w packages/remote-vue" && npm run build -w packages/host
